inputs.price_source: [Assumption] OTC Pink indicative ~$520 bid / ~$540 ask (Yahoo Finance snapshot 2026-06-10); Stooq has no WRLC.US quote
inputs.fcf_source: FY2025 cash from operations $4.76M minus maintenance capital spending ~$0.63M, divided by 93,298 shares; excludes net realized/unrealized marketable securities gains (~$0.54M net in other income)
inputs.shares_source: FY2025 annual report Note 1: 93,298 shares issued and outstanding at December 31, 2025 and 2024
inputs.acres_source: FY2025 annual report Note 1: owns over 73,000 acres in East Tennessee
inputs.land_carrying_source: FY2025 balance sheet: Land and Land Improvements $10,643,053
inputs.debt_note: Lines of credit and long-term debt paid to zero at December 31, 2025
inputs.normalization_note: 2024 included heavy recreation capex ($3.6M) and elevated carbon credits ($0.91M vs $0.17M in 2025). Lawrence base uses normalized owner cash after maintenance capex, not peak carbon or securities trading gains.

optionality_gate.floor_value_note: GAAP equity $259.83/sh plus liquid assets (cash + marketable securities ~$90/sh) less overlap; land at historical cost — not fair-value NAV
optionality_gate.overlay_nav_note: [Assumption] Segment operating sum-of-parts ~$480/sh before undeveloped land mark; see segment_build
optionality_gate.notes: Price ~2.0× GAAP book but book land ~$146/acre on 73k acres; recreation segment monetizes much of acreage. Floor pass on debt-free balance sheet and distributable cash; not a deep GAAP book discount.

gaap_vs_fair_value.policy: Land and improvements at historical cost; operating recreation infrastructure capitalized in PP&E

not_in_model_requires_refresh: Per-acre fair-value appraisal on 73,000-acre East Tennessee block
Carbon offset contract volume and price beyond 2025 trough
Oil and gas royalty upside if Appalachian drilling accelerates
Windrock Park attendance and permit growth post-2024 capex cycle

segments_or_options.label: Timber / mineral acreage not fully in run-rate cash
segments_or_options.nav_assumption: [Assumption] Incremental value above PP&E cost for non-recreation timber block; partial overlap with segment cash flows
segments_or_options.evidence: Note 1: timber harvesting agreements; land at $10.6M cost on 73k acres

segments_or_options.label: American Carbon Registry offset sales (contract trough 2025)
segments_or_options.evidence: Note 5: carbon revenue $172.5K in 2025 vs $912.5K in 2024 under Carbon Agreement

segments_or_options.label: Gas and oil royalty expansion on company acreage
segments_or_options.evidence: Note 1: royalty agreements; FY2025 gas/oil royalties $475.5K

segments_or_options.label: Level 1 marketable equity portfolio
segments_or_options.nav_assumption: Mark-to-market $6.03M at 12/31/2025; volatile — not in Lawrence FCF₀

segments.label: Natural Resources
segments.evidence: Note 9 FY2025: timber, oil/gas royalties, carbon, tower/wind leases; segment net income $1,030,777

segments.label: Recreation (Windrock Park)
segments.evidence: Note 9 FY2025: land use permits $3.42M, rental $3.79M, merchandise $2.27M; segment net income $2,982,767

options.label: Carbon offset contract recovery
options.base_terminal_rationale: P_base 0.4 × normalized $0.6M/yr carbon revenue capitalized at 10×

options.label: Undeveloped timber / mineral acreage
options.base_terminal_rationale: Partial fair-value uplift above $10.6M land carrying; overlap haircut vs recreation cash flows
options.evidence: 73,000 acres at ~$146/acre GAAP vs recreation monetization

segment_build.corporate_drag_note: Consolidated taxes, interest, and marketable securities volatility not allocated to segments; FY2025 other income net $0.77M

bear.notes: Carbon stays depressed; recreation permit growth stalls; securities portfolio marks down

bull.notes: Windrock Park attendance re-accelerates post-capex; carbon and royalty recovery; multiple re-rate

stance_proposal.override_reason: Debt-free land company with real recreation cash flows, but price ~2× GAAP book and ~8% premium to segment overlay; OTC illiquidity (~25 shares/day) and carbon trough cap accumulate stance.

growth_explanation.mechanism: Recreation growth from Windrock Park land-use permits and rentals after 2024 facility capex; natural resources tied to timber harvest cycles and royalty volumes.
growth_explanation.base_assumption_source: FY2025 segment reporting; 2024 heavy capex year normalized down
growth_explanation.bear_change: Carbon credits remain at 2025 trough; no permit price increases
growth_explanation.bull_change: Carbon Agreement optional cycles resume; oil/gas royalty volumes expand on Appalachian activity

option_scan.question: In-business option: Carbon offset contract recovery?
In-business option: Undeveloped timber / mineral acreage?
option_scan.evidence: 73,000 acres at ~$146/acre GAAP vs recreation monetization

paths.label: Segment-derived growth (pre-falsifier)
paths.weight_why: Segment blend before falsifier pass; diagnostic only when it differs from falsifier-adjusted.
weight_falsifiers: Included at full weight alongside falsifier-adjusted without divergence note

paths.label: Bear scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Downside stress; low weight because bear is a sensitivity, not a competing explanation of base mechanics.
weight_falsifiers: Bear assumptions become base case in filings (e.g. sustained volume collapse)
paths.hard_to_vary: yes: asymmetric low weight is structural

paths.label: Bull scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Upside stress probe; higher than bear because optionality archetype has skew, but still below primary paths.
weight_falsifiers: Bull growth sustained in filings for 4+ quarters without falsifier trigger

paths.label: NAV overlay dated payoff (7yr to overlay base)
paths.weight_why: Answers a different question (NAV convergence) than 7yr cash-flow IRR; capped weight to avoid theory conflation.
weight_falsifiers: NAV overlay base not updated when segment build or filings change >10%
floor_pass false but weight above 15% without [HUMAN REVIEW]

flags: NAV overlay is a different theory (asset payoff vs cash-flow IRR); weight capped at 10% to limit theory conflation.

deutsch_checks.reach: Weights encode evidence tier (A primary → D external), not fitted to hit a target IRR

synthesis.notes: Capstone IRR combining filings, segments, overlays, third-party, qualitative

context_overlay.disclaimer: Context only. Tailwinds inform stance and overlay sizing; they do not auto-inflate Lawrence base IRR. Promotion to base case requires [HUMAN REVIEW].

lens_consensus.disclaimer: Advisory lens blend only. Does not replace Lawrence total-synthesis stance gate without [HUMAN REVIEW].

total_return_panel.error: Vendor events are discovery evidence; primary-source completeness has not been established.
total_return_panel.return_contract: split-adjusted close excluding dividends; event amounts normalized for later splits; cash reinvested at ex-date close; pre-tax nominal

coverage.note: Vendor events are discovery evidence; primary-source completeness has not been established.
